betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Advanced Circuit Plate§f is the §6high-density circuit board§f that backs every §6Advanced Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:2) in the AR progression. It is a tier-up from the §6Basic Circuit Plate§f (10056) and uses §6Block of Redstone§f instead of redstone dust to achieve higher circuit density.

§6Production Path (advcircuitplate.json)§f:
- Machine: §6Precision Assembler§f (10012) at 900 ticks
- Input: 1x §6ingotGold§f (forge:ore_dict), 1x §6Block of Redstone§f (minecraft:redstone_block), 1x §6Silicon Wafer§f (advancedrocketry:wafer:0)
- Output: 1x §6Advanced Circuit Plate§f (advancedrocketry:itemcircuitplate:1)
- Energy: 100 RF/t
- Alternative: §6Precision Laser Etcher§f (advcircuitplateetcher.json) at 1200 ticks, 600 RF/t, produces 2x plates per recipe using §6lensPrecisionLaserEtcher§f, §6plateGold§f, §6Block of Redstone§f, 4x §6Silicon Wafer§f

The advanced circuit plate is the §6input§f for the §6Advanced Circuit§f (ic:2) recipe. It is consumed at a §61:4 ratio§f by the §6Cutting Machine§f (advbasiccircuit.json) to produce §6Advanced Circuits§f. The advanced plate has 2× the circuit density of the basic plate.

The advanced circuit plate is a prerequisite for the §6Advanced Circuit§f (chain), the §6Warp Controller§f (10038), and the §6Planet Holo Selector§f (chain). It is consumed by every high-tier AR machine that requires §6Advanced Circuit§f input.

§eTip§f: Stockpile §6Block of Redstone§f (9 dust = 1 block) before starting this quest — the §6Block of Redstone§f is the §6bottleneck ingredient§f for advanced plates. The §6Precision Laser Etcher§f recipe gives you 2x output for the same wafer cost but at higher energy — use it when you have surplus power.
